title: System settings
subtitle: Manage platform-wide services. Changes take effect immediately and are audited.

general.configured: The help center is available to users
general.notConfigured: No external help center is configured
general.helpHint: Link an internal knowledge base, public documentation site, or any external help website.
general.helpUrlHint: Only complete HTTP or HTTPS URLs are supported. Save an empty value to hide every help entry point.
general.previewEnabled: Help appears on sign-in pages and in the top-right area after sign-in.
general.previewDisabled: No help entry point is shown when this field is empty.
general.footerHint: Changes apply to all user interfaces immediately.

email.configured: Email notifications are ready to send
email.notConfigured: Configure SMTP to enable email notification channels
email.transportHint: Shared by alert notifications and future platform emails.
email.passwordHint: The password is encrypted with the platform key and is never returned to the browser.
email.testHint: Save settings, then verify connection and delivery to an address.

google.configured: Google OpenID Connect is configured and enabled
google.notConfigured: Configure an OAuth client to offer Google sign-in
google.configurationHint: Uses Authorization Code, PKCE, state, and nonce for secure sign-in.
google.secretHint: The secret is encrypted and never returned to the browser.
google.redirectHint: Add this exact URL to Authorized redirect URIs in Google Cloud.
google.domainsHint: Enter one per line or separate with commas. Leave blank for any domain. The restriction applies to sign-in and registration.
google.allowRegistrationHint: When disabled, only existing accounts already linked to Google can sign in.
google.footerHint: Changes take effect immediately and are written to the audit log.
google.testHint: Checks access to Google's OpenID configuration. Full client validation occurs during an actual authorization flow.
google.linkPolicyHint: A matching Google email is never merged automatically with an existing password account. The user must sign in with their password and connect Google under Password & security, preventing accidental account takeover.

monitoring.statusHint: The Monitor scheduler dispatches tasks and the Worker collects metrics and evaluates alerts.
monitoring.intervalHint: Runs continuously in production without manual collection.
monitoring.retentionHint: Expired minute snapshots are removed by the collector.
monitoring.rangesHint: Detail charts automatically downsample longer time ranges.
monitoring.privacyHint: Only normalized routes, status codes, latency, and aggregate counts are stored—never request parameters, bodies, or responses.

quota.plansHint: Manage plan templates that can be assigned to workspaces.
quota.editHint: Leave a value blank for unlimited; changes apply to assigned workspaces.
quota.name: Plan name
